ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company for which the earnings report is filed */,
  "period_ending" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period covered by the report */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the earnings report */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the earnings report */,
  "estimate" REAL /* Analyst's estimate of earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "reported" REAL /* Actual reported earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Difference between the reported and estimated earnings */,
  "surprise_percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference between the reported and estimated earnings */,
  "revenue_estimate" REAL /* Analyst's estimate of revenue */,
  "revenue_reported" REAL /* Actual reported revenue */,
  "revenue_surprise" REAL /* Difference between the reported and estimated revenue */,
  "revenue_surprise_percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference between the reported and estimated revenue */,
  "announcement_time" TEXT /* Time of the earnings announcement (e.g., AfterClose, BeforeOpen) */,
  "day1_close_date" TEXT /* Date of the close price on the day of the announcement */,
  "day1_close_price" REAL /* Close price on the day of the announcement */,
  "day2_open_date" TEXT /* Date of the open price on the day after the announcement */,
  "day2_open_price" REAL /* Open price on the day after the announcement */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price during the trading session following the announcement */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price during the trading session following the announcement */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price during the trading session following the announcement */,
  "volume_day1" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the day of the announcement */,
  "volume_day2" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the day after the announcement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the earnings report data (e.g., SEC filing, company press release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earnings report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES earnings_reports ("report_id")
)
